items.title: Modern Sharing Dialogs
items.description: Sharing and member management now use cleaner spacing, stronger hierarchy, and clearer access language.

items.title: Clearer Member Lists
items.description: Member rows now use refined surfaces, better role display, and more obvious invite actions.

items.title: Polished Confirmations
items.description: Edit, delete, leave, and remove-member dialogs now match the refreshed Baskit style.

items.title: Consistent Dialog Surfaces
items.description: Modal windows now use warmer surfaces, rounded corners, and reduced visual noise.
